latin: Omnia in ludo sunt, frater. omnia in ludo. sive vincis sive cadis, lusus ipse manet. hoc scire debes antequam in viam exeas.

questions.prompt: What is everything part of, according to the speaker?
What must one know before going out?

translation: It's all in the game, brother. All in the game. Whether you win or you fall, the game itself endures. You must know this before you go out on the street.
